title: Counterweight Craft
description: This mod has added some counterweight blocks to control weight in valkyrien skies
body:
This mod has added some counterweight synthesizable blocks to control weight in valkyrien skies
![Different counter blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dff0f98778e91bd41394ccc2a48c57d1def6a96.png)
Different counter blocks have different weights,you can control the weight of your vehicle through them
